levels.name: no_evidence
levels.descriptor: No attempt to explain number properties or representations.

levels.name: emerging
levels.descriptor: With support, identifies some number properties but explanations are incomplete or inaccurate.

levels.name: developing
levels.descriptor: Explains basic place value and some number relationships but struggles with prime factorisation or conversions.

levels.name: competent
levels.descriptor: Independently explains place value, prime factorisation, and relationships between fractions, decimals, and percentages accurately.

levels.name: extending
levels.descriptor: Applies understanding to complex number forms and explains sophisticated relationships between different representations.

rubrics.competent_framing_judge_rationale: The descriptor declares the capability as demonstrated independently and accurately, standing alone as evidence that the learning target is met.

levels.name: no_evidence
levels.descriptor: No attempt at numerical operations.

levels.name: emerging
levels.descriptor: Performs basic operations with whole numbers but makes frequent errors with fractions or negatives.

levels.name: developing
levels.descriptor: Accurately performs most operations but struggles with order of operations or standard form calculations.

levels.name: competent
levels.descriptor: Accurately applies four operations, order of operations, powers, roots, and standard form across integers, fractions, decimals, and negative numbers.

levels.name: extending
levels.descriptor: Fluently combines multiple operations and number systems to solve complex multi-step problems efficiently.

prerequisite_edges.rationale: Understanding number representations is essential before performing operations across different number forms.

rubrics.competent_framing_judge_rationale: The descriptor declares the capability as demonstrated with 'accurately applies' and covers all elements of the learning target without hedging language or positioning it as incomplete.

levels.name: no_evidence
levels.descriptor: No attempt to use standard units or round numbers.

levels.name: emerging
levels.descriptor: With support, identifies some standard units or attempts basic rounding with errors.

levels.name: developing
levels.descriptor: Uses standard units and rounds numbers but makes occasional errors or needs prompting.

levels.name: competent
levels.descriptor: Independently uses appropriate standard units of measurement and rounds numbers to suitable degrees of accuracy.

levels.name: extending
levels.descriptor: Applies unit conversion and sophisticated rounding strategies across unfamiliar measurement contexts.

prerequisite_edges.rationale: Understanding place value is essential for rounding to appropriate degrees of accuracy.

rubrics.competent_framing_judge_rationale: The descriptor declares the capability as demonstrated independently without hedging language or positioning it as incomplete.

levels.name: no_evidence
levels.descriptor: No attempt at approximation or error calculation.

levels.name: emerging
levels.descriptor: With support, attempts basic approximation but produces inaccurate estimates or errors.

levels.name: developing
levels.descriptor: Independently estimates answers using approximation but struggles with systematic error calculation using inequalities.

levels.name: competent
levels.descriptor: Independently uses approximation to estimate answers and calculates possible errors accurately using inequality notation.

levels.name: extending
levels.descriptor: Applies approximation and error analysis to complex multi-step problems or unfamiliar contexts.

prerequisite_edges.rationale: Rounding skills are essential for meaningful approximation techniques.
Basic calculation fluency supports confidence in estimation and error work.

rubrics.competent_framing_judge_rationale: The descriptor declares the capability as fully demonstrated with 'independently uses' and 'calculates accurately', showing complete mastery of the learning target without hedging language.

levels.name: no_evidence
levels.descriptor: No attempt to use technology for calculations.

levels.name: emerging
levels.descriptor: Uses calculator with support but produces inaccurate results or limited understanding.

levels.name: developing
levels.descriptor: Uses calculator accurately for basic operations but struggles with number set concepts.

levels.name: competent
levels.descriptor: Uses calculators and technology accurately to calculate and demonstrates understanding of infinite number sets.

levels.name: extending
levels.descriptor: Applies technology strategically across contexts and explores advanced number set properties.

prerequisite_edges.rationale: Cannot use technology for calculations without understanding basic operations and number systems.
Understanding accuracy and rounding typically precedes technology-assisted calculation work.

rubrics.competent_framing_judge_rationale: The descriptor declares the capability as demonstrated independently without hedging language or positioning it as incomplete.

levels.name: no_evidence
levels.descriptor: No attempt to use algebraic notation.

levels.name: emerging
levels.descriptor: Uses basic algebraic notation with support but makes frequent errors.

levels.name: developing
levels.descriptor: Uses algebraic notation correctly in simple contexts but struggles with complex expressions.

levels.name: competent
levels.descriptor: Uses and interprets algebraic notation including coefficients, powers, brackets, and standard conventions accurately and independently.

levels.name: extending
levels.descriptor: Applies algebraic notation fluently in unfamiliar contexts and complex multi-step expressions.

rubrics.competent_framing_judge_rationale: The descriptor declares the capability as demonstrated accurately and independently, matching the learning target's level of demand without hedging language.

levels.name: no_evidence
levels.descriptor: No attempt at algebraic manipulation.

levels.name: emerging
levels.descriptor: With support, attempts basic term collection but makes frequent errors.

levels.name: developing
levels.descriptor: Independently collects like terms and expands simple brackets with occasional errors.

levels.name: competent
levels.descriptor: Independently simplifies algebraic expressions by collecting terms, expanding brackets, and factoring accurately.

levels.name: extending
levels.descriptor: Applies manipulation techniques to complex expressions involving multiple operations and nested structures.

prerequisite_edges.rationale: Cannot manipulate algebraic expressions without understanding algebraic notation and conventions.

rubrics.competent_framing_judge_rationale: The descriptor declares the capability as demonstrated independently and accurately, standing alone as evidence that the learning target is met.

levels.name: no_evidence
levels.descriptor: No attempt to work with coordinates or graphs.

levels.name: emerging
levels.descriptor: With support, plots some points or attempts basic coordinate work with errors.

levels.name: developing
levels.descriptor: Plots coordinates and sketches simple graphs but struggles with linear equation manipulation.

levels.name: competent
levels.descriptor: Independently works with coordinates, sketches function graphs accurately, and manipulates linear equations to standard form.

levels.name: extending
levels.descriptor: Applies coordinate skills to complex functions or connects graphical and algebraic representations fluently.

prerequisite_edges.rationale: Cannot manipulate linear equations without understanding algebraic notation and conventions.

rubrics.competent_framing_judge_rationale: The descriptor declares the capability as demonstrated independently without hedging language or positioning it as incomplete.

levels.name: no_evidence
levels.descriptor: No attempt to interpret graphs or analyze relationships.

levels.name: emerging
levels.descriptor: With support, identifies basic features but makes errors interpreting gradients or intercepts.

levels.name: developing
levels.descriptor: Independently reads values from graphs but struggles with gradient analysis or problem solving.

levels.name: competent
levels.descriptor: Independently analyzes gradients and intercepts, estimates values accurately, and solves problems using graphical representations.

levels.name: extending
levels.descriptor: Applies graphical analysis to complex scenarios and connects multiple mathematical representations fluently.

prerequisite_edges.rationale: Cannot interpret graphs without understanding coordinates and graph creation.
Algebraic notation understanding supports interpreting equations from graphical features.

rubrics.competent_framing_judge_rationale: The descriptor declares the capability as demonstrated independently at the learning target's level of demand without hedging language or positioning it as incomplete.

levels.name: no_evidence
levels.descriptor: No attempt to generate sequence terms.

levels.name: emerging
levels.descriptor: Generates some terms with heavy support but makes frequent errors.

levels.name: developing
levels.descriptor: Generates terms correctly in simple cases but struggles with complex rules.

levels.name: competent
levels.descriptor: Independently generates terms of sequences using both term-to-term and position-to-term rules accurately.

levels.name: extending
levels.descriptor: Generates terms for complex sequences and creates original sequences with given properties.

prerequisite_edges.rationale: Position-to-term rules require understanding algebraic notation and substitution.

rubrics.competent_framing_judge_rationale: The descriptor clearly states the learner independently and accurately demonstrates the complete capability described in the learning target.

levels.name: no_evidence
levels.descriptor: No attempt to identify sequence types or patterns.

levels.name: emerging
levels.descriptor: With support, identifies some sequence patterns but cannot determine types or formulas.

levels.name: developing
levels.descriptor: Independently recognizes arithmetic or geometric sequences but struggles to find nth terms consistently.

levels.name: competent
levels.descriptor: Independently recognizes arithmetic and geometric sequences and accurately determines their nth term formulas.

levels.name: extending
levels.descriptor: Applies sequence recognition to complex patterns or derives formulas for non-standard sequence types.

prerequisite_edges.rationale: Must understand sequence generation before analyzing sequence types and finding general terms.
Nth term formulas require algebraic notation with variables, coefficients, and powers.

rubrics.competent_framing_judge_rationale: The descriptor clearly states the learner independently demonstrates the full capability without hedging language or positioning it as incomplete.

levels.name: no_evidence
levels.descriptor: No attempt to work with ratios or proportional relationships.

levels.name: emerging
levels.descriptor: With support, identifies some ratios but makes errors in proportional reasoning.

levels.name: developing
levels.descriptor: Uses ratios and fractions correctly in familiar contexts but struggles with complex problems.

levels.name: competent
levels.descriptor: Uses ratios, fractions, and proportional reasoning accurately to solve problems involving multiplicative relationships between quantities.

levels.name: extending
levels.descriptor: Applies proportional reasoning flexibly across unfamiliar contexts and connects multiple mathematical concepts.

rubrics.competent_framing_judge_rationale: The descriptor declares the capability as demonstrated accurately and independently, standing alone as evidence that the learning target is met.

strand.strand_name: Ratio, proportion and rates of change

levels.name: no_evidence
levels.descriptor: No attempt to solve rate or percentage problems.

levels.name: emerging
levels.descriptor: With support, attempts rate or percentage calculations but produces inaccurate results.

levels.name: developing
levels.descriptor: Solves basic rate or percentage problems independently but struggles with compound units.

levels.name: competent
levels.descriptor: Independently solves problems involving rates, percentage changes, and compound units in real-world contexts accurately.

levels.name: extending
levels.descriptor: Applies rate and percentage concepts to complex multi-step problems or unfamiliar contexts.

prerequisite_edges.rationale: Proportional reasoning is fundamental to understanding rates and percentage changes.

rubrics.competent_framing_judge_rationale: The descriptor clearly states the learner independently and accurately demonstrates the capability described in the learning target without any hedging language or implications of incompleteness.

strand.strand_name: Ratio, proportion and rates of change

levels.name: no_evidence
levels.descriptor: No attempt to calculate areas or perimeters.

levels.name: emerging
levels.descriptor: Calculates areas or perimeters with significant support or produces inaccurate results.

levels.name: developing
levels.descriptor: Calculates areas and perimeters for simple shapes but struggles with composite shapes.

levels.name: competent
levels.descriptor: Independently calculates perimeters and areas of triangles, parallelograms, trapezia, circles, and composite shapes accurately.

levels.name: extending
levels.descriptor: Applies area and perimeter calculations to solve complex multi-step problems involving multiple shapes.

prerequisite_edges.rationale: Measuring geometric figures typically precedes calculating their properties.
Understanding geometric shape terminology supports area and perimeter calculations.

rubrics.competent_framing_judge_rationale: The descriptor clearly states the learner independently and accurately demonstrates the complete capability described in the learning target.

levels.name: no_evidence
levels.descriptor: No attempt to calculate volumes.

levels.name: emerging
levels.descriptor: Attempts volume calculations with significant errors or requires substantial support.

levels.name: developing
levels.descriptor: Calculates volumes of simple shapes but makes errors with complex prisms.

levels.name: competent
levels.descriptor: Independently calculates volumes of cuboids, cubes, and other prisms including cylinders accurately.

levels.name: extending
levels.descriptor: Applies volume calculations to composite shapes or real-world problem contexts.

prerequisite_edges.rationale: Area calculation is required for volume formulas of prisms.
Understanding three-dimensional shape properties supports volume calculation concepts.

rubrics.competent_framing_judge_rationale: The descriptor declares the capability as demonstrated independently and accurately, standing alone as evidence that the learning target is met.

levels.name: no_evidence
levels.descriptor: No attempt at ruler and compass constructions.

levels.name: emerging
levels.descriptor: Attempts basic constructions with significant errors or requires extensive guidance throughout.

levels.name: developing
levels.descriptor: Performs some standard constructions correctly but struggles with precision or complex procedures.

levels.name: competent
levels.descriptor: Accurately performs standard ruler and compass constructions and applies perpendicular distance from point to line.

levels.name: extending
levels.descriptor: Combines multiple constructions fluently or creates novel geometric solutions using construction principles.

prerequisite_edges.rationale: Drawing and measuring skills are essential for accurate ruler and compass constructions.
Understanding geometric terminology and notation supports construction procedures.

rubrics.competent_framing_judge_rationale: The descriptor declares the capability as demonstrated with 'accurately performs' and 'applies', indicating the learning target is fully met.

levels.name: no_evidence
levels.descriptor: No attempt to describe or sketch geometric shapes.

levels.name: emerging
levels.descriptor: With support, attempts to describe or sketch shapes using incomplete or incorrect terminology.

levels.name: developing
levels.descriptor: Independently describes and sketches basic shapes but uses imprecise terminology or conventional notations.

levels.name: competent
levels.descriptor: Independently describes and sketches geometric shapes accurately using appropriate conventional terms and notations consistently.

levels.name: extending
levels.descriptor: Applies conventional terminology and notation to describe complex composite or three-dimensional geometric configurations.

prerequisite_edges.rationale: Drawing and measuring skills typically precede describing and sketching with conventional notation.

rubrics.competent_framing_judge_rationale: The descriptor declares the capability as fully demonstrated with 'independently' and 'accurately' and 'consistently', positioning Competent as complete success at meeting the learning target.

levels.name: no_evidence
levels.descriptor: No attempt to identify geometric properties or congruence.

levels.name: emerging
levels.descriptor: With support, identifies some basic properties but applies congruence criteria inaccurately.

levels.name: developing
levels.descriptor: Independently identifies most properties of triangles, quadrilaterals, and circles but inconsistently applies congruence criteria.

levels.name: competent
levels.descriptor: Independently identifies and applies properties of triangles, quadrilaterals, and circles, including congruence criteria accurately and consistently.

levels.name: extending
levels.descriptor: Applies geometric properties and congruence criteria to solve complex problems involving multiple shapes.

prerequisite_edges.rationale: Must know conventional terms and notations to identify geometric properties.
Drawing and measuring skills typically established before identifying abstract properties.

rubrics.competent_framing_judge_rationale: The descriptor declares the capability as demonstrated independently with accuracy and consistency, clearly indicating the learning target is met.

levels.name: no_evidence
levels.descriptor: No attempt to construct triangles or create enlargements.

levels.name: emerging
levels.descriptor: With support, attempts basic constructions but produces inaccurate or incomplete figures.

levels.name: developing
levels.descriptor: Independently constructs some congruent triangles and creates enlargements with minor inaccuracies or gaps.

levels.name: competent
levels.descriptor: Independently constructs congruent triangles using appropriate methods and creates accurate similar shapes through enlargement.

levels.name: extending
levels.descriptor: Applies construction and enlargement techniques to solve complex problems or unfamiliar contexts.

prerequisite_edges.rationale: Ruler and compass constructions are essential methods for constructing congruent triangles.
Understanding congruence criteria is necessary to construct congruent triangles.
Basic drawing and measuring skills typically precede construction techniques.

rubrics.competent_framing_judge_rationale: The descriptor declares the capability as demonstrated independently and can stand alone as evidence that the learning target is met.

levels.name: no_evidence
levels.descriptor: No attempt to identify or describe geometric transformations.

levels.name: emerging
levels.descriptor: With support, identifies some transformation types but describes results inaccurately or incompletely.

levels.name: developing
levels.descriptor: Independently identifies transformation types and describes some results but misses key properties or details.

levels.name: competent
levels.descriptor: Independently identifies properties of translations, rotations and reflections and accurately describes their results on given figures.

levels.name: extending
levels.descriptor: Applies transformation knowledge to predict combined effects or solve complex geometric problems involving multiple transformations.

prerequisite_edges.rationale: Must understand geometric shape terminology and notation to describe transformation results.
Understanding geometric properties helps recognize what remains invariant under transformations.

rubrics.competent_framing_judge_rationale: The descriptor declares the capability as demonstrated independently and accurately, standing alone as evidence that the learning target is met.

levels.name: no_evidence
levels.descriptor: No attempt to identify three-dimensional shape properties.

levels.name: emerging
levels.descriptor: Identifies some faces, edges or vertices with support but applies inaccurately.

levels.name: developing
levels.descriptor: Identifies properties of three-dimensional shapes but struggles to apply them systematically.

levels.name: competent
levels.descriptor: Uses properties of faces, surfaces, edges and vertices of three-dimensional shapes to solve problems independently.

levels.name: extending
levels.descriptor: Applies three-dimensional shape properties to solve complex or unfamiliar geometric problems.

prerequisite_edges.rationale: Describing geometric shapes establishes vocabulary needed for three-dimensional shape properties.

rubrics.competent_framing_judge_rationale: The descriptor declares the capability as demonstrated independently at the learning target's level of demand without hedging language or positioning it as incomplete.

levels.name: no_evidence
levels.descriptor: No attempt to apply angle properties.

levels.name: emerging
levels.descriptor: Identifies some angle properties but applies them incorrectly or with support.

levels.name: developing
levels.descriptor: Applies basic angle properties correctly but struggles with complex configurations or reasoning.

levels.name: competent
levels.descriptor: Independently applies properties of angles at points, on lines, with parallels, and in polygons to solve problems.

levels.name: extending
levels.descriptor: Transfers angle properties to unfamiliar contexts or combines multiple geometric relationships fluently.

prerequisite_edges.rationale: Cannot apply angle properties without ability to measure and identify angles.
Understanding geometric shapes and notation typically precedes applying their angle properties.
Knowledge of geometric properties provides foundation for understanding angle relationships.

rubrics.competent_framing_judge_rationale: The descriptor clearly states the learner independently applies all the required angle properties to solve problems, demonstrating complete mastery of the learning target.

levels.name: no_evidence
levels.descriptor: No attempt at geometric proof or theorem application.

levels.name: emerging
levels.descriptor: With support, identifies some geometric properties but produces incomplete or inaccurate reasoning.

levels.name: developing
levels.descriptor: Independently applies basic theorems but struggles with multi-step proofs or complex relationships.

levels.name: competent
levels.descriptor: Independently constructs geometric proofs using theorems, congruence, similarity, and trigonometric relationships to derive results accurately.

levels.name: extending
levels.descriptor: Transfers proof techniques to novel contexts or integrates multiple geometric concepts in sophisticated reasoning.

prerequisite_edges.rationale: Cannot construct proofs without understanding geometric properties and congruence criteria.
Angle properties form the foundation for geometric reasoning and proof construction.
Geometric notation and terminology are typically established before formal proof work.
Understanding similarity through construction supports similarity proofs and reasoning.

rubrics.competent_framing_judge_rationale: The descriptor declares the capability as demonstrated independently and accurately, standing alone as evidence that the learning target is met.

no structural signature reached 2/3 agreement; signatures=[(('no_evidence', 'within_limit', 'recognise'), ('emerging', 'within_limit', 'recognise'), ('developing', 'within_limit', 'none'), ('competent', 'within_limit', 'analyse'), ('extending', 'within_limit', 'apply'), ('competent_scope', 'scoped')), (('no_evidence', 'within_limit', 'recognise'), ('emerging', 'within_limit', 'recognise'), ('developing', 'within_limit', 'apply'), ('competent', 'within_limit', 'analyse'), ('extending', 'within_limit', 'apply'), ('competent_scope', 'scoped')), (('no_evidence', 'within_limit', 'recognise'), ('emerging', 'within_limit', 'recognise'), ('developing', 'within_limit', 'none'), ('competent', 'within_limit', 'analyse'), ('extending', 'within_limit', 'apply'), ('competent_scope', 'unscoped'))]

levels.name: no_evidence
levels.descriptor: No attempt to conduct probability experiments.

levels.name: emerging
levels.descriptor: Records outcomes but uses inaccurate language or incorrect probability scale.

levels.name: developing
levels.descriptor: Records and describes outcomes accurately but analysis lacks depth or precision.

levels.name: competent
levels.descriptor: Records, describes and analyses frequency of outcomes using appropriate probability language and 0-1 scale accurately.

levels.name: extending
levels.descriptor: Applies probability analysis to complex scenarios or connects findings to theoretical predictions.

rubrics.competent_framing_judge_rationale: The descriptor declares the capability as fully demonstrated with accurate execution of all required elements, standing alone as evidence the learning target is met.

levels.name: no_evidence
levels.descriptor: No attempt to enumerate sets or operations.

levels.name: emerging
levels.descriptor: With support, identifies some set elements but produces incomplete or inaccurate operations.

levels.name: developing
levels.descriptor: Independently enumerates simple sets but struggles with systematic union and intersection operations.

levels.name: competent
levels.descriptor: Systematically enumerates sets and accurately determines their unions and intersections using tables and grids.

levels.name: extending
levels.descriptor: Applies systematic set operations to complex scenarios or combines multiple operations fluently.

rubrics.competent_framing_judge_rationale: The descriptor declares the capability as fully demonstrated with systematic enumeration and accurate determination of unions and intersections, meeting the learning target without hedging language.

levels.name: no_evidence
levels.descriptor: No attempt to analyze distributions.

levels.name: emerging
levels.descriptor: With support, identifies basic features but produces inaccurate interpretations.

levels.name: developing
levels.descriptor: Describes distributions using some appropriate measures but lacks complete analysis.

levels.name: competent
levels.descriptor: Describes, interprets and compares single variable distributions using appropriate graphs and measures of central tendency and spread.

levels.name: extending
levels.descriptor: Transfers distribution analysis to complex datasets or connects multiple statistical concepts fluently.

prerequisite_edges.rationale: Cannot analyze distributions without ability to construct and interpret appropriate data representations.

rubrics.competent_framing_judge_rationale: The descriptor directly states the learner can perform all components of the learning target without hedging language or positioning it as incomplete.

levels.name: no_evidence
levels.descriptor: No attempt to construct data representations.

levels.name: emerging
levels.descriptor: Constructs basic representations with support but contains significant errors or omissions.

levels.name: developing
levels.descriptor: Constructs appropriate representations independently but with minor errors in labeling or scaling.

levels.name: competent
levels.descriptor: Constructs and interprets appropriate tables, charts and diagrams accurately for categorical and numerical data.

levels.name: extending
levels.descriptor: Selects optimal representations and justifies choices based on data characteristics and purpose.

rubrics.competent_framing_judge_rationale: The descriptor declares the capability as fully demonstrated without hedging language or positioning it as incomplete.

levels.name: no_evidence
levels.descriptor: No attempt to analyze relationships between variables.

levels.name: emerging
levels.descriptor: With support, identifies some patterns but produces inaccurate scatter graphs.

levels.name: developing
levels.descriptor: Creates scatter graphs independently but describes relationships with limited mathematical precision.

levels.name: competent
levels.descriptor: Independently describes mathematical relationships between two variables and accurately illustrates them using scatter graphs.

levels.name: extending
levels.descriptor: Analyzes complex bivariate relationships and evaluates correlation strength using mathematical terminology.

prerequisite_edges.rationale: Cannot construct scatter graphs without understanding how to construct data representations.

rubrics.competent_framing_judge_rationale: The descriptor declares the capability as fully demonstrated with 'independently describes' and 'accurately illustrates', indicating complete mastery of the learning target.
